Title: Ensure 'Require Security Device' is set to 'true'
Target: $value = (Get-ItemProperty -Path HKLM:\Software\Microsoft\Policies\PassportForWork\*\Device\Policies -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).RequireSecurityDevice; if ($value) { Write-Host $value } else { Write-Host 'Value Not Found'}

Title: Ensure 'Allow Windows Ink Workspace' is set to 'Enabled: but the user can't access it above the lock screen' OR 'Disabled'
Ensure 'Allow Clipboard Redirection' is set to 'Not allowed'
Ensure 'Allow Networking' is set to 'Not allowed'
Ensure 'Allow Auto Update' is set to 'Enabled'
Ensure 'Defer Feature Updates Period in Days' is set to 'Enabled: 180 or more days'
Ensure 'Defer Quality Updates Period (Days)' is set to 'Enabled: 0 days'
Ensure 'Manage preview builds' is set to 'Disable Preview builds'
Ensure 'Scheduled Install Day' is set to 'Every day'
Ensure 'Block 'Pause Updates' ability' is set to 'Block'
Ensure 'Require PIN For Pairing' is set to 'Enabled: Pairing ceremony for new devices will always require a PIN' OR 'All pairings will require PIN'
Ensure 'Backup Directory' is set to 'Backup the password to Azure AD only'
Ensure 'Password Age Days' is set to 'Configured: 30 or fewer'
Ensure 'Password Complexity' is set to 'Large letters + small letters + numbers + special characters'
Ensure 'Password Length' is set to 'Configured: 15 or more'
Ensure 'Post-authentication actions' is set to 'Reset the password and logoff the managed account' or higher
Ensure 'Post Authentication Reset Delay' is set to 'Configured: 8 or fewer hours, but not 0'
